title: The Magic of Floating Islands

scenes.text: These islands are made entirely of reeds that float on water.
This is Uros Islands, located on Lake Titicaca in Peru.
The Uros people have lived on these islands for centuries, crafting them from totora reeds.
Visitors can sail between islands and learn about the local culture.
scenes.label: CULTURAL EXPERIENCE

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Uros Islands, Lake Titicaca - Peru. These unique floating islands are made of reeds, home to the Uros people for centuries. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
